title: IPS Soft Reference Specification
description: Defines the cross-module soft reference pattern for IPS ER layer decoupling ({应用层} layer isolation). Replaces physical FK with dual-field soft ref (_key + _id) for cross-layer/cross-module entity references.

{target}_key.description: Soft ref business key pointing to {target_table}.code. Used as primary lookup key at runtime.

{target}_id.description: Soft ref UUID pointing to {target_table}.id. Cached for JOIN performance, validated asynchronously.

rules.description: Cross-layer FK constraints are forbidden. Replace fk_ref field property and fk[] array entries with soft ref field pair.

validation.write_time: GORM BeforeCreate/BeforeUpdate callback validates {target}_key exists in target table via API call
validation.read_time: JOIN on {target}_id for performance; fallback to {target}_key lookup if _id is NULL
validation.reconciliation: Scheduled job verifies _key↔_id consistency and orphans

index.description: btree index on {target}_id for JOIN performance. No index needed on {target}_key (rarely used for JOIN).

applicable_scenarios.{应用层}_to_DATA: Mandatory. All {应用层}→DATA cross-module references must use soft ref.
applicable_scenarios.{应用层}_to_{应用层}_cross_module: Mandatory. All cross-module {应用层}→{应用层} references must use soft ref.
applicable_scenarios.DATA_to_{平台层}: Forbidden. DATA layer must not reference {平台层} layer at all (use flow_template_key VARCHAR pattern).
applicable_scenarios.same_module_internal: Keep physical FK. Within same ER JSON file, normal FK is preferred.
applicable_scenarios.same_domain_cross_submodule: Optional. {交易模块1}↔{交易模块2} same domain may keep FK (design decision per case).

exceptions.reason: DATA→{应用层} backfill, E06 event only, single-direction write
exceptions.treatment: Soft ref (filing_key + filing_id), no FK constraint

exceptions.reason: {数据模块M}→{数据模块I} backfill, E07 event only
exceptions.treatment: Soft ref (case_key + case_id), no FK constraint
